addLiquidityUnbalancedNestedPool(address.details: Traverses child pools and adds liquidity bottom-up.

addLiquidityUnbalancedNestedPoolHook((ad.details: Can only be called by the Vault.

returns.funcs: The function selectors implemented by the facet.

returns.interfaces: The interface IDs implemented by the facet.

facetMetadata().details: Exposed to allow for single call retrieval of all facet metadata.

returns.functions: The function selectors implemented by the facet.
returns.interfaces: The interface IDs implemented by the facet.

removeLiquidityProportionalNestedPoolHoo.details: Can only be called by the Vault.

addLiquidityUnbalancedNestedPool(address.notice: Add liquidity to a nested pool structure.

addLiquidityUnbalancedNestedPoolHook((ad.notice: Hook for adding liquidity to nested pools.

facetFuncs().notice: Declares the function selectors implemented by the exposing facet for use in a composing proxy.

facetInterfaces().notice: Declares the interfaces implemented by the exposing facet for use in a composing proxy.

facetMetadata().notice: Declares comprehensive metadata about the exposing facet.

facetName().notice: Declares a canonical nonunique name for the exposing facet.

getSender().notice: Get the first sender which initialized the call to Router.

queryAddLiquidityUnbalancedNestedPool(ad.notice: Query add liquidity to a nested pool structure.

queryRemoveLiquidityProportionalNestedPo.notice: Query remove liquidity from a nested pool structure.

removeLiquidityProportionalNestedPool(ad.notice: Remove liquidity from a nested pool structure proportionally.

removeLiquidityProportionalNestedPoolHoo.notice: Hook for removing liquidity from nested pools.
